debug_info.goal:
S : Type u_1
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
f : Fin n → RelIO S
⊢ PortMap.getIO (@Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf (RelIO S) n f) { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i } = f i

failed_attempts:
induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          simp only [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range, List.map_cons]
          have shift_lemma (l : List (Fin n)) (j : Nat) :
            PortMap.getIO ((l.map (λ x => (x.1 + 1, f (lift_fin x)))).toAssocList) (j + 1) =
            PortMap.getIO ((l.map (λ x => (x.1, f (lift_fin x)))).toAssocList) j := by
              induction l with
              | nil => simp [PortMap.getIO, List.toAssocList]
              | cons hd tl inner_ih =>
                simp [PortMap.getIO, List.toAssocList]
                by_cases h : hd.1 = j
                · simp [h]
                · simp [h, inner_ih]
          obtain ⟨ival, ilt⟩ := i
          match ival, ilt with
          | 0, _ => simp [PortMap.getIO, List.toAssocList]
          | j+1, h =>
            simp [PortMap.getIO, List.toAssocList]
            rw [shift_lemma]
            exact ih (f := f ∘ lift_fin)
